fields.description: Simulation mode — no real orders placed
Proxy wallet address of the trader to copy
"percentage", "balance", or "fixed"
Fixed USDC amount per trade when SIZE_MODE=fixed
Percentage of MAX_POSITION_SIZE (or balance) per trade
Max USDC per position
Minimum USDC to allocate dynamically
Maximum USDC to allocate dynamically
Enable dynamic random sizing
When SIZE_MODE=proportional, multiply the trader's trade size by this factor (1.0 = same size, 0.5 = half, 2.0 = double)
Place auto limit-sell after entry
Take-profit target % above buy price
Stop-loss % below buy price (0 = disabled)
Auto-pause if session P&L drops below this % of starting balance (0 = disabled)
Max % of total balance to keep in open positions
Minimum USDC to keep in wallet at all times — never deploy below this (live mode only)
Minimum USDC to spend on an entry — never skips if size >= this
Skip buy if market closes within N seconds
Seconds to wait for GTC fill before cancelling
Max retries on order failure
"market" or "limit"
Seconds between price-check / redemption cycles
Fictitious balance for simulation mode (USDC)
Minimum total trading volume (USDC) a market must have to be entered. 0 = disabled.
Comma-separated tag slugs to allow (e.g. "crypto,politics"). Empty = all markets allowed.
Comma-separated conditionIds to exclusively enter. Empty = all markets allowed.
Comma-separated conditionIds to never enter.
Use Kelly criterion for dynamic position sizing based on historical win rate.
Minimum resolved trades before Kelly kicks in.
Maximum fraction of balance Kelly criterion can allocate per trade (0.25 = max 25%).
Whether the strategy is running (auto-restored on restart)
Simulation mode
Comma-separated assets to trade. Available: btc,eth,sol,xrp,bnb,doge,hype
USDC per side (minimum $5 on live mode)
Target sell price (0.01-0.99)
Take-profit margin above entry price (e.g. 0.10 = 10 cents)
Min midpoint for each token. Avoids very one-sided markets.
Max midpoint for each token. Avoids very one-sided markets.
Max combined midpoint (YES+NO) to enter. 1.00 = never enter above fair value.
Minimum spread (1 - combined midpoint) required to enter. 0.03 = require at least 3¢ profit margin.
Seconds before close to cut loss
Exit early if the current combined position value drops below the stop-loss floor
Early exit if current position value < cost × (1 - this%). E.g. 30 = exit if value drops to 70% of cost
Maximum number of simultaneously active positions. 0 = unlimited.
Auto-exit a position open for more than N hours. 0 = disabled.
Use Binance short-term momentum to skew YES/NO capital allocation
Kline interval for Binance momentum. Options: 1m, 3m, 5m
Number of klines to compute short-term momentum (3-5 recommended)
Maximum bias percent (e.g. 75 means up to 75% capital on trending side)
Enable dynamic sizing and fractional profit targets
Minimum USDC to allocate dynamically
Maximum USDC to allocate dynamically
Enable adaptive cut-loss strategy
Min combined price for adaptive CL
Enable recovery buy after cut-loss
Min price for recovery buy
Seconds between market detection polls
Fictitious balance for Market Maker simulation mode (USDC)
Whether the strategy is running (auto-restored on restart)
Simulation mode
Comma-separated assets to snipe
Max shares per side per market
Tier 1 price (4¢) — 20% of capital
Tier 2 price (3¢) — 30% of capital
Tier 3 price (2¢) — 50% of capital
Rounds to pause asset after a win
Min volume increase % since last round to trigger order placement. 0 = disabled.
Per-asset schedule: "ETH=11:40-15:40,BTC=09:00-17:00"
Time-based sizing: "HH:MM-HH:MM:factor,..."
Fictitious balance for Sniper simulation mode (USDC)
Whether the strategy is running (auto-restored on restart)
Applies Simulation mode globally and overrides individual strategy dry-run settings
Minimum USDC that must remain in the wallet at all times across all strategies (Live mode)
Maximum total USDC deployed in open positions across ALL strategies simultaneously. 0 = disabled.
Auto-pause ALL strategies if total P&L loss in the window exceeds this % of current balance. 0 = disabled.
Time window (hours) used for circuit breaker P&L calculation.
Maximum total entries across all strategies per minute (0 = unlimited)
Active trading mode: high | intermediate | low | custom
Polygon RPC endpoint. Get a free key at https://alchemy.com or https://quicknode.com
Enable Telegram notifications
Bot token from @BotFather (e.g. 123456789:AAF...)
Your chat/group ID (use @userinfobot to find it)
Send an immediate alert when a single position closes with a loss larger than this USDC amount. 0 = disabled.
